content: templates-default is a zero-dependency leaf package: types are defined locally (mirroring @sisu/protocol) rather than importing from protocol, keeping templates-default a pure data package with no runtime deps
Biome v2.4.x removed organizeImports top-level key — use 'assist.actions.source.organizeImports: on' instead. Schema URL must match biome CLI version (2.4.6 not 2.0.0)

name: built-in-role-exports
description: 9 built-in roles exported as const readonly arrays in TypeScript src/index.ts. Lookup helpers (getBuiltInRole, getBuiltInWorkflow) return undefined-safe for unknown IDs. Workflow steps reference role IDs; all validated by 72 tests at 100% coverage.
